name: Delivery Job
description:
Your running a little low on cash and found work at the new pizzeria that just opened...

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS

Things to note:

  • Each time you finish a delivery and come back to the pizzeria you should say your preference for your next order, the preference should be who you want to be at the house.

  • Use a persona with additional details that you want expressed by the bot. E.g Sexual history, kinks you like, extra detail on body type.
creator: Penguin070
